title: [Skyship, Core]
description: The area is dark and hot, and the air is thick with humidity and the acrid smell of smoke.  Lanterns attached to the ceiling cast crisscrossing shadows at all angles.  The bulkheads are lined with floor-to-ceiling clockwerke devices fitted with metal gears and steam-ejecting pipes that hum and vibrate with constant activity.  The floor is a hard metal interspersed with thin strips of dark wood that proceeds deeper into the ship's core.
